description: List talent pools. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/talent_pools. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include offset, scope, limit.

params.name: offset
params.description: Skip number of talent pools from the beginning, used for ‘load more’, offset for next page should be current offset + limit

params.name: scope
params.description: If no scope is given list all talent pools, if scope is ‘archived’ than list archived talent pools, if scope is ‘not_archived’ list all but archived talent_pools

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit number of talent pools, default is unlimited

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/talent_pools

Required params: company_id

Optional params: offset, scope, limit
